typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varEndYear as integer (),
	varOTables as string (),
	varStartYear as integer (),
	var_batches as string (),
	var_batch_nbr as integer (),
	var_log_path as string (),
	var_fzg_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fn_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_ln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	Var_log_path as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT   P1.row_id   ,MSP.row_id as master_row_id   ,P1.hosp_patient_nbr   ,P1.phn   ,P1.phn_clean   ,PP.name_first_middle   ,P1.first_name_score   ,P1.name_first   ,PP.name_last   ,P1.last_name_score   ,P1.name_first_middle_clean   ,P1.name_last_clean   ,P1.birth_date   ,P1.gender   ,P1.aka_name   ,P1.row_score   ,P1.dupe_count   ,P1.julian_month   ,P1.patient_nbr   ,P1.street_addr1   ,P1.street_addr2   ,P1.city   ,P1.province   ,P1.postal_code   ,P1.phone_number   ,P1.data_source   ,P1.phn_clean as master_phn   ,MSP.name_last_clean as master_name_last   ,MSP.name_first_middle_clean as master_name_first_middle   ,MSP.birth_date as master_birth_date   ,MSP.gender as master_gender   ,MSP.data_source as master_data_source   ,NULL AS [mark]   ,P1.match_code   ,60005 as stage_id FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_fz_output] P1   inner JOIN (SELECT                 phn_clean, name_last_clean,name_first_middle_clean,birth_date, gender,data_source                 ,row_id                 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY phn_clean ORDER BY julian_month DESC, patient_nbr DESC) rank_nbr               FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_fz_output]               WHERE  [mark]=2) MSP           on P1.phn_clean=MSP.phn_clean            INNER JOIN  [ecms].[tmp_patient_prep] PP           on P1.row_id=PP.row_id WHERE  P1.[mark]=2 AND MSP.rank_nbr=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> src1
src1 sink(input(
		last_name_score as integer,
		match_code as string,
		master_data_source as string,
		gender as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		city as string,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		julian_month as short,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		name_last as string,
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		aka_name as string,
		province as string,
		master_birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		master_name_last as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		patient_nbr as integer,
		name_first as string,
		name_last_clean as string,
		master_phn as string,
		master_name_first_middle as string,
		first_name_score as integer,
		master_gender as string,
		stage_id as integer,
		row_score as integer,
		data_source as string,
		master_row_id as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		phone_number as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string,
		name_first_middle as string,
		mark as short
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		last_name_score,
		match_code,
		master_data_source,
		gender,
		dupe_count,
		city,
		birth_date,
		julian_month,
		street_addr1,
		street_addr2,
		name_last,
		name_first_middle_clean,
		aka_name,
		province,
		master_birth_date,
		master_name_last,
		phn_clean,
		patient_nbr,
		name_first,
		name_last_clean,
		master_phn,
		master_name_first_middle,
		first_name_score,
		master_gender,
		stage_id,
		row_score,
		data_source,
		master_row_id,
		hosp_patient_nbr,
		phn,
		phone_number,
		row_id,
		postal_code,
		name_first_middle,
		mark)) ~> dest
